dsl_rule.translation_notes: Signal uses 'realized volatility' (hvol_20 proxy) as primary trigger. Entry_long: increase leverage when hvol_20 is very low (<0.10). Entry_short: decrease leverage when hvol_20 is high (>0.20). Exit conditions rebalance based on volatility regime changes. Thresholds are representative; actual implementation should calibrate based on asset class and historical volatility distribution. The 60/40 portfolio allocation is a target structure, not a trading condition.

source_rule_text: Adjust portfolio leverage based on volatility levels - increase leverage when volatility is very low, decrease when volatility is high
